T

tearDown() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivityTest
releases Espresso intents after each test
TermsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_terms screen it shows the app terms and allows the user to leave the screen
TermsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.TermsActivity
 
testAdminEventDetailsViewsDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminEventDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that the key admin event detail views are visible.
testAdminZoneButtonsDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminZoneActivityTest
Verifies that the main admin action buttons are visible.
TestAuthHelper - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Shared authentication helper for instrumentation tests to avoid unnecessary repeated sign-ins.
testBackButtonClickable() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminZoneActivityTest
Verifies that the back button can be tapped.
testBackButtonClosesActivity() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivityTest
Verifies that pressing the back button closes the screen.
testBackButtonClosesActivity() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminEventDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that pressing the back button closes the screen.
testBackButtonClosesActivity() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that pressing the back button closes the screen.
testBrowseEventsViewsDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivityTest
Verifies that the main browse-events views are visible.
testClickEventOpensDetails() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivityTest
Verifies that selecting an event opens the details screen.
testConstructor() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItemTest
Tests that the constructor correctly initializes and sets the default status of notification to "PENDING"
testCreateUser() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileTest
Verifies that the constructor stores the supplied field values.
testInitialization() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepositoryTest
sets up the test environment by creating a new NotificationRepository instance
testKeepRecentWinner() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryExpirationTest
Verifies that winners within the 3-day window are NOT swept and marked as CHOSEN
testNotificationItemInitialization() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationSystemUnitTest
Verifies that a NotificationItem is correctly initialized with default values.
testNotificationStatusUpdate() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationSystemUnitTest
Verifies status updates for a NotificationItem.
TestQRCodeBackButton() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.QRCodeTest
Test if Back button destroy the intent and finished activity
TestQRCodeBitmap() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.QRCodeTest
Test if the QRCode bitmap is generated
TestQRCodeImageView() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.QRCodeTest
Test to see if the imageView is visible
testRespondToInvitation() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.InvitationIntegrationTest
tests that updating an invitation status correctly updates tracking record
testSetFields() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileTest
Verifies that the mutable profile fields can be updated through setters.
testSettersAndGetters() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItemTest
Tests that setters and getters work for all fields
testSweepExpiredWinner() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryExpirationTest
Tests that processExpiredWinners correctly identifies a winner past the 3-day threshold and marks them as DECLINED in both the event and user documents.
testUserProfileDetailsViewsDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that the user profile detail views are visible.

Test if the event screen shows the total number of entrants for the waitlist
